SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-05-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-05-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MARGARET WU. PLAINTIFF RONG WANG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SYNCTRUCK LOGISTICS, INC. IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT SYNCTRUCK LOGISTICS, LLC. IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT LUIS TOLEDO IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT FERNANDO FLAMENCO IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MARGARET WU; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-05-2023 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WANG, RONG RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SYNCTRUCK LOGISTICS INC SYNCTRUCK LLC(201523810260) $7,650.00 PRINCIPAL, $295.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,945.00, DEFENDANTS SYNCTRUCK LOGISTICS INC. AND SYNCTRUCK LLC ARE JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY LIABLE. DEFENDANTS LUIS TOLEDO AND FERNANDO FLAMENCO ARE DISMISSED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
